questions.q: Louisiana Republicans passed a bill in early May 2026 to eliminate an elected New Orleans court clerk position just days before which exoneree was to take office?
Which destructive, invasive insect was recently discovered in Ontario, renewing concerns about its threat to Canada's vineyards and fruit trees?
Due to privacy concerns, the Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corporation recently changed its policy on announcing jackpot winners. What information is now released to the media?
options: Only their first name and last initial
No names are released at all
Only the winner's city of residence
questions.correctText: Only their first name and last initial

questions.q: A study published in the Proceedings of the Royal Society B on May 3, 2026, settled a long-running behavioral debate by confirming what surprising mathematical talent in honeybees?
options: They comprehend the concept of zero

questions.q: According to a May 2026 ruling, which U.S. federal appeals court restricted abortion access by blocking the mailing of mifepristone?
Tesla recently started selling Model 3s in Canada at its lowest price ever. Where are these specific EVs manufactured?
A Federal Court recently ruled that a failed refugee claimant and convicted identity thief can stay in Canada because he previously acted as an informant against which gang?

Astronomical research published on May 3, 2026, indicates that interstellar comet 3I/Atlas originated from a colder, dimmer star system based on high levels of which hydrogen isotope found in its water?
